Package yams.mechanisms.config

package yams.mechanisms.config
Builder-style configuration classes for every mechanism in the YAMS library.

Every YAMS mechanism requires a corresponding config object to be constructed before the mechanism itself is instantiated. Config classes follow a fluent builder pattern: each with*() setter mutates the config and returns this, allowing calls to be chained in a single expression.

Available Configuration Classes

  • ArmConfig — single-jointed arm with angle limits and feedforward tuning
  • ElevatorConfig — linear elevator with height limits and gravity compensation
  • PivotConfig — pivot mechanism with continuous or bounded rotation
  • FlyWheelConfig — flywheel velocity mechanism with optional second follower motor
  • SwerveDriveConfig — full swerve-drive chassis geometry and module layout
  • SwerveModuleConfig — per-module drive and steer motor configuration
  • DifferentialMechanismConfig — differential (tank-drive) mechanism pairing two motors
  • MechanismPositionConfig — position targets and tolerance settings shared across positional mechanisms
  • SensorConfig — external encoder or absolute sensor attachment configuration

Motor Controller Requirement

A SmartMotorController must be provided before most mechanisms can be constructed. It may be supplied either through the config constructor or via the withSmartMotorController() setter: 


 SmartMotorController motor = new TalonFXController(new TalonFX(1));

 // Option A: pass in the constructor
 ElevatorConfig config = new ElevatorConfig(motor)
     .withMaxHeight(Meters.of(1.5))
     .withGearing(9.0);

 // Option B: set via fluent API
 ElevatorConfig config = new ElevatorConfig()
     .withSmartMotorController(motor)
     .withMaxHeight(Meters.of(1.5))
     .withGearing(9.0);

Fluent Chaining Example


 ArmConfig armConfig = new ArmConfig(motor)
     .withGearing(100.0)
     .withSoftLimits(Rotation2d.fromDegrees(-90), Rotation2d.fromDegrees(90))
     .withFeedforward(new ArmFeedforward(0.1, 0.5, 1.2))
     .withSensor(new SensorConfig(encoder).withOffset(Rotation2d.fromDegrees(15)));

    Package
    Description
    yams.mechanisms
    Top-level mechanism abstractions for the YAMS (Yet Another Mechanism System) library.
    yams.mechanisms.positional
    Position-controlled mechanism implementations for the YAMS library.
    yams.mechanisms.swerve
    Swerve drive mechanism classes.
    yams.mechanisms.velocity
    Velocity-controlled mechanism implementations for the YAMS library.
  • Class
    Description
    ArmConfig
    Arm configuration class.
    DifferentialMechanismConfig
    Configuration for a DifferentialMechanism driven by two coordinated motors working differentially.
    ElevatorConfig
    Elevator configuration class.
    FlyWheelConfig
    FlyWheel configuration class.
    MechanismPositionConfig
    A configuration class for specifying the position and visualization properties of a mechanism relative to a robot in a 3D coordinate system.
    MechanismPositionConfig.Plane
    The planes that the mechanism could be on, used for position calculations.
    PivotConfig
    Pivot configuration class.
    SensorConfig
    Sensor configuration for simulated and real sensors.
